title: uragoga josephi
side_effects: Uragoga josephi can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased blood pressure, rapid heartbeat, and dizziness due to its stimulant properties. Overconsumption of the plant has also been known to cause nausea, vomiting, and stomach cramps. In severe cases, excessive use of uragoga josephi can lead to tremors, seizures, and even respiratory failure. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
